summary: South Bay companies closed $3.9 billion in funding over the past six weeks, with major rounds for AI and robotics leaders like Nexthop AI ($500M, Santa Clara), Ayar Labs ($500M, San Jose), and Mind Robotics ($500M, Palo Alto). Most local tech firms are actively hiring, though a handful have pulled back. Two free events this week offer networking on AI tools and tech careers in linguistics.
